work-att.title: Technical Support Specialist at AT&T
work-att.content:
## Responsibilities

- Maintain essential IT operations including **OS (macOS, Windows)**, security tools, applications, servers, and hardware
- Install, configure, and support desktops, laptops, **VMs**, mobile phones, **VOIP**, and backup systems
- Provide Tier 1–2 support using **ITSM and Zendesk**, resolving an average of **140 tickets per month**
- Execute systems and network design, documentation, and administration for seamless business operations
- Identify and implement hardware/software solutions and resolve complex network security issues
- Configure and troubleshoot network devices (**routers, switches, firewalls**)
- Manage user administration, GPOs, and security permissions in **Active Directory and Azure Entra ID**
- Oversee endpoint security and device compliance using **Microsoft Intune**
- Administer **Microsoft 365** and cloud-integrated services aligned with Azure Fundamentals

work-nabil.title: IT Support Specialist at Nabil Bank
work-nabil.content:
## Responsibilities

- Administered the complete **Microsoft ecosystem** (Active Directory, GPOs, DHCP/DNS, M365, Exchange)
- Provided Tier 1-3 technical support for **2,000+ users** across 150+ branches
- Resolved 25-30 tickets daily with a **95%+ first-contact resolution** rate
- Orchestrated end-to-end user provisioning, onboarding/offboarding, and resource allocation
- Managed hardware lifecycle: vendor procurement, imaging, deployment, and **asset tracking**
- Configured **FortiGate firewalls** with granular security policies (web filtering, VPN, App control)
- Managed virtualized environments using **VMware vSphere and Hyper-V** for safe sandboxing
- Executed daily backup operations for the **Core Banking System (CBS)**

edu-gbc-combined.title: George Brown College
edu-gbc-combined.content:
## Technical Skills & Industry Training

- **Full-Stack Development**: Building modular systems with React, Node.js, and API integrations
- **Python & Automation**: Developing advanced scripts for data processing and task automation
- **Cloud Infrastructure**: Implementing and managing services with Azure and Firebase
- **AI & Data Discovery**: Utilizing Machine Learning models for predictive analysis and insights
- **Mobile Systems**: Advanced troubleshooting and deployment for enterprise iOS & Android apps
- **Agile Methodologies**: Experience with Scrum, Jira, and SDLC practices for modern IT teams

edu-jntu.title: JNTUK: Computer Science & Engineering
edu-jntu.content:
## Core Technical Foundation

- **Operating Systems**: In-depth understanding of OS concepts and Unix/Linux programming
- **Database Management**: Designing and managing relational databases with SQL
- **Computer Networks**: Comprehensive knowledge of TCP/IP, network protocols, and administration
- **Software Engineering**: Applying SDLC principles, UML modeling, and testing methodologies
- **Programming Paradigms**: Practical experience in Java, C++, and C for core system development
- **Web Technologies**: Building responsive web applications with HTML, CSS, and scripting
- **Security**: Foundational knowledge in Cryptography and Network Security

work-qbuildt.title: IT Support Technician
work-qbuildt.content:
## End-User Support & Troubleshooting

- **Issue Diagnosis**: Identifying, analyzing, and documenting technical issues across systems, applications, and network connectivity
- **Hardware & Software Support**: Troubleshooting desktops, laptops, printers, peripherals, and resolving OS/software-related problems
- **System Installation & Configuration**: Installing and maintaining operating systems, productivity tools, and business applications
- **Network & Connectivity Support**: Assisting with internet, email, and network access issues to ensure uninterrupted operations
- **Device Setup & Deployment**: Configuring workstations, mobile devices, printers, and IT equipment for end users
- **Ticketing & Documentation**: Maintaining accurate logs of issues, resolutions, and workflows using help desk systems
- **User Guidance & Escalation**: Providing user training and escalating complex issues to senior IT staff when necessary
